title: monday workspace size limit
excerpt:

posts.author: ybbf (ybbf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, folders are only limited to one extra layer of hierarchy. I want to know is there any limit like below per workspace?

  • per layer size limit. how many Board/Doc/Dashboard etc can created in the same layer in a folder? or in the first layer of workspace
  • total size limit in per workspace. includes Board/Doc/Dashboard etc
